title: Roadmap — visual learning path per class
description: A second presentation of a course's modules→lessons as a roadmap (learning path) with per-lesson completion status. Ported from CareerPack's dependency-free skill-roadmap node renderer, rebuilt onto this app's data. No new tables and no new convex — DERIVED client-side from courses.getOverview + progress.getCourseProgress. No routes: fills the Kelas overview via a Silabus ⇄ Roadmap toggle.

kelas: KelasCourse overview (no lesson): a Silabus ⇄ Roadmap toggle renders <CourseRoadmap tenantId courseSlug lessonHref> as the full-width game-map
KelasCourse lesson open: <CourseNav> is the secondary-sidebar rail beside the LessonPlayerView sheet (Silabus list ⇄ Roadmap mini-trail, current lesson highlighted)
